missions.name: Cache Raid
missions.brief: Ridge infil. Breach the north gate, strip the cache, sweep the relay, and exfil east.
missions.initialEvent: Raven Actual: ridge infil is live. Cut the gate, recover both packages, and stay light.
missions.quietReport: Raven net quiet. Recover the relay to build a hostile picture.
missions.clearReport: Raven net clear. No active patrol traffic remains on this objective.

phases.title: Ridge Infiltration
phases.brief: Raven wants a clean north breach. Stay light, pull the first package, and touch the relay before the ridge search net wakes up.
phases.objective: Breach the north gate, recover the cache package, then tap the relay to open the east exfil picture.
phases.event: Raven Actual: keep the ridge quiet until the relay is in hand.
phases.routeSummary: Command route favors the north ridge cut and the relay pocket before the east peel.
phases.interactionHint: The relay is the hinge point for the cleaner exfil lane.

phases.title: Relay Copied
phases.objective: Intel is live. Recover the remaining package and stage for the east extraction lane.
phases.event: Raven Actual: relay copied. Use the traffic picture to finish the strip.
phases.radio: Raven relay copied. Patrol traffic is now feeding across the tactical map.
phases.intelStatus: Radio intel live. Raven is pushing patrol movement and exfil pressure onto the tactical board.
phases.routeSummary: Route refreshed. The east peel now tracks active search movement around the ridge road.
phases.interactionHint: Use the live route to avoid the reforming patrol screen.

phases.title: Cache Stripped
phases.objective: Packages secured. Break contact and move east to the extraction point.
phases.event: Raven Actual: cache stripped. Peel east before the ridge net rebuilds.
phases.routeSummary: Command route is now pure exfil. East is the cleanest remaining lane.

phases.title: Operation Complete
phases.objective: Cache stripped and archived. Review the branch result before rolling to the next op.
phases.event: Raven Actual: good extract. The ridge cache is off the board.

phases.title: Operation Lost
phases.objective: Ridge infil collapsed before extraction. Review the archive branch and reinsert.
phases.event: Raven Actual: operator lost on the ridge.

branches.title: Ghosted Intercept
branches.summary: Relay copied and the raid stayed mostly clean. Command flags this as Raven's preferred stealth archive.
branches.campaignResult: Ghosted intercept archived for Raven on the ridge cache raid.

branches.title: Shock Assault
branches.summary: The packages came out, but the ridge had to be taken by force. Command archives the raid as a loud success.
branches.campaignResult: Shock assault archived for Raven after a loud cache strip.

branches.title: Broken Infiltration
branches.summary: The ridge raid collapsed before exfil. Reinsert with tighter timing around the relay and package sweep.
branches.campaignResult: Broken infiltration report filed for Raven after the cache raid failed.

missions.name: Hostage Recovery
missions.brief: Push the village blocks, breach the safehouse, pull the beacon, and clear the south road.
missions.initialEvent: Viper Actual: move block to block, breach the safehouse, then drag the route south.
missions.quietReport: Viper net dark. Tap the street relay to expose the safehouse screen.
missions.clearReport: Viper net clear. The village search net has gone cold.

phases.title: Village Push
phases.brief: Viper wants the outer blocks cleaned methodically. Open the street relay before you commit to the safehouse.
phases.objective: Sweep into the blocks, breach the relay site, and build enough picture to hit the safehouse clean.
phases.event: Viper Actual: work block to block and do not rush the south road.
phases.routeSummary: Command route staggers through the relay intersection before turning into the hostage block.
phases.interactionHint: The street relay gives you the cleanest read on the safehouse screen.

phases.title: Safehouse Screen Exposed
phases.objective: Street relay copied. Breach the safehouse, pull the beacon, and set the south road for extraction.
phases.event: Viper Actual: the village net is exposed. Move on the safehouse now.
phases.radio: Viper copied the street relay. South-road blockers and village movers are now tagged.
phases.intelStatus: Radio intel live. The village screen is now visible and the south road is updating in real time.
phases.routeSummary: Route refreshed. The south road peel now updates off the street relay intercept.

phases.title: South Road Pull
phases.objective: Beacon secured. Break contact through the south road and extract before the blocks refill.
phases.event: Viper Actual: beacon is secure. Drag the route south and leave the blocks behind.
phases.routeSummary: Command route is now south-road only. The village interior is expendable once you hit extraction.

phases.title: Hostage Package Out
phases.objective: Beacon recovered and route cleared. Review the branch archive before the next operation.
phases.event: Viper Actual: package is out. Good work on the village pull.

phases.title: Village Collapse
phases.objective: The safehouse run failed before extraction. Rebuild the route and try the blocks again.
phases.event: Viper Actual: operator lost in the village.

branches.title: Surgical Pull
branches.summary: The relay and beacon came out with limited noise. Command marks this as Viper's clean hostage recovery branch.
branches.campaignResult: Surgical pull archived for Viper after a clean village recovery.

branches.title: Hard Breach
branches.summary: The safehouse had to be torn open under pressure, but the package still came out. Command logs a hard-breach success.
branches.campaignResult: Hard breach archived for Viper after forcing the village recovery.

branches.title: Street Loss
branches.summary: The village recovery failed before the route could be opened. Expect a tougher screen next reinsert.
branches.campaignResult: Street loss filed for Viper after the hostage recovery failed.

missions.name: Recon & Exfil
missions.brief: Skirt the treeline, recover the ridge package, probe the shack net, and ghost north.
missions.initialEvent: Ghost Lead: stay quiet, fill the map, lift both packages, then fade to the north tree line.
missions.quietReport: Ghost net quiet. Recover a receiver to surface the patrol pattern.
missions.clearReport: Ghost net clear. No active search teams are transmitting.

phases.title: Silent Probe
phases.brief: Ghost wants the route mapped before contact. Touch the shack receiver, recover the ridge package, and keep the treeline quiet.
phases.objective: Stay hidden through the treeline, copy the shack receiver, and build enough picture to slip north.
phases.event: Ghost Lead: fill the map first and do not advertise the route.
phases.routeSummary: Command route snakes through treeline pockets and the shack receiver before the ridge package.
phases.interactionHint: The shack receiver is the safest way to turn patrol drift into a usable map.

phases.title: Patrol Pattern Exposed
phases.objective: Receiver copied. Lift the remaining package and ghost north before the search ring tightens.
phases.event: Ghost Lead: pattern is live. Use it to stay ahead of the patrol ring.
phases.radio: Ghost copied the shack receiver. Patrol arcs are now painting across the map.
phases.intelStatus: Radio intel live. Ghost now has a moving patrol pattern and a clearer north peel.
phases.routeSummary: Route refreshed. The north exfil lane now avoids the thickest moving patrol arcs.

phases.title: North Fade
phases.objective: Packages secured. Break north through the tree line and do not get fixed on the ridge.
phases.event: Ghost Lead: packages are up. Fade north and keep the net guessing.
phases.routeSummary: Command route is now a northbound fade through treeline cover and off-map extraction.

phases.title: Recon Archived
phases.objective: Receiver and packages recovered. Review the archive branch and set up the next reconnaissance pass.
phases.event: Ghost Lead: recon packet complete. Good north fade.

phases.title: Recon Burned
phases.objective: The reconnaissance run burned before extraction. Reset the treeline approach and try again.
phases.event: Ghost Lead: operator lost before the north fade.

branches.title: Cold Shadow
branches.summary: Ghost copied the patrol picture and stayed mostly unseen. Command logs a model reconnaissance branch.
branches.campaignResult: Cold shadow archived for Ghost after a low-signature recon pass.

branches.title: Running Break
branches.summary: The patrol picture came out, but the team had to fight for the fade. Command marks a contested recon success.
branches.campaignResult: Running break archived for Ghost after a contested north fade.

branches.title: Burned Route
branches.summary: The reconnaissance line collapsed before extraction. Expect the next probe to meet a hotter patrol ring.
branches.campaignResult: Burned route filed for Ghost after the recon operation failed.

missions.name: Convoy Ambush
missions.brief: Break the convoy, pull the manifest and tablet, raid the fallback cache, and peel west.
missions.initialEvent: Jackal Actual: break the road column, seize the cargo, then disappear through the west trees.
missions.quietReport: Jackal net quiet. Recover the convoy radio to track fallback movement.
missions.clearReport: Jackal net clear. Convoy survivors are off the air.

phases.title: Road Break
phases.brief: Jackal wants the convoy snapped fast, then the fallback cache stripped before reinforcements settle the road again.
phases.objective: Break the column, recover the convoy radio, and use the intercept to shape the fallback cache raid.
phases.event: Jackal Actual: break the road first, then roll the west tree line.
phases.routeSummary: Command route hits the road break, then folds west toward the fallback cache and extraction lane.
phases.interactionHint: The convoy radio is the key to the cleaner fallback cache route.

phases.title: Fallback Tracked
phases.objective: Convoy radio copied. Strip the fallback cache and peel west before the survivors regroup.
phases.event: Jackal Actual: intercept is live. Finish the cache before the road survivors collapse west.
phases.radio: Jackal copied the convoy radio. Fallback movement is now visible across the route board.
phases.intelStatus: Radio intel live. Convoy fallback movement is feeding onto the tactical map.
phases.routeSummary: Route refreshed. The west peel now tracks fallback traffic around the convoy kill zone.

phases.title: West Peel
phases.objective: Manifest and tablet secured. Strip out to the west extraction lane before the road hardens.
phases.event: Jackal Actual: cargo is secured. Peel west and do not linger on the road.
phases.routeSummary: Command route is now a westbound peel through the convoy debris and tree line.

phases.title: Ambush Complete
phases.objective: Convoy broken and cargo archived. Review the branch result before rolling the next operation.
phases.event: Jackal Actual: convoy is broken and the cargo is ours.

phases.title: Ambush Failed
phases.objective: The road ambush collapsed before extraction. Reset the break point and try the convoy again.
phases.event: Jackal Actual: operator lost before the west peel.

branches.title: Clean Cut
branches.summary: The convoy radio came out and the west peel stayed tight. Command archives a disciplined ambush branch.
branches.campaignResult: Clean cut archived for Jackal after a disciplined convoy ambush.

branches.title: Rolling Wreck
branches.summary: The convoy was smashed and stripped under heavy pressure. Command still logs a successful cargo seizure.
branches.campaignResult: Rolling wreck archived for Jackal after a heavy convoy ambush.

branches.title: Road Loss
branches.summary: The ambush failed before the west peel could settle. Expect a sharper convoy response next insertion.
branches.campaignResult: Road loss filed for Jackal after the convoy ambush failed.
